design_philosophy.core_loop: Pilot a spacecraft through a labyrinthine mine, locate and destroy the reactor core, escape before self-destruction while fighting virus-infected robots
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Navigation disorientation in true-3D space combined with combat pressure and escape-before-detonation timer
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Mercenary pilot navigating hostile extraterrestrial mining installations with unrestricted six-degrees-of-freedom movement in a fully 3D environment
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Combines space flight simulator mechanics with traditional FPS gunplay; embraces six degrees of freedom and full 3D environments rather than constraining player movement to flat planes like contemporaries

difficulty.lives_system: Extra lives awarded by accumulating points; losing a life returns player to level start with reset weapons (laser level 1, default missiles for difficulty level), losing all rescued hostages and acquired powerups
difficulty.checkpointing: Per-level checkpoint system with reactor destruction triggering timed escape sequence; death within level respawns at level start
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Multiple difficulty modes available; secret levels provide optional harder content; hostage rescue is optional secondary objective

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon upgrade path for primary weapons (laser levels can be increased); secondary weapon ammo collection; shield and energy management through powerup collection; persistent weapon modifications (Quad Lasers, Spreadfire, Fusion Cannon progression)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Colored access keys (combination of three possible keys per level) required to reach reactor; secret levels unlocked through undocumented means; progression blocked by reactor destruction requirement
replayability_hooks: Secret levels (3 hidden levels within 30 total)

world_building_techniques: Environmental storytelling through mine locations across Solar System
Hostage rescue narrative integration (PTMC workers held by infected robots)
Level-based mission structure tied to infected mining facilities

boss_design.philosophy: Boss encounters replace standard reactor core objectives on select levels (2 levels feature boss robots instead of reactor cores); framed as final obstacles before escape
notable_bosses: Boss robot encounters (mechanics not detailed in available sources)

faction_indicators: Post Terran Mining Corporation (PTMC) - human faction being targeted by virus
Player character as hired mercenary - mercenary faction affiliation
danger_signals: Reactor core meltdown forcing timed escape
environmental_storytelling: Mining installations across Solar System showing industrial human expansion
Infected robot presence indicating viral contamination spread
Hostage areas revealing human casualties and PTMC personnel vulnerability
